enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.description: Plugin is enabled and eligible for runtime activation.

active.label: Active
active.description: Plugin runtime component is active and healthy.

degraded.label: Degraded
degraded.description: Plugin is running with a recoverable runtime fault.

failed.label: Failed
failed.description: Plugin failed validation or runtime startup/operation.

disabled.label: Disabled
disabled.description: Plugin is installed but disabled by configuration.

E_MANIFEST_VALIDATION.label: Manifest Validation Failed
E_MANIFEST_VALIDATION.description: Plugin manifest does not satisfy required schema or value constraints.

E_DUPLICATE_PLUGIN_ID.label: Duplicate Plugin ID
E_DUPLICATE_PLUGIN_ID.description: More than one plugin declares the same id; ids must be unique.

E_SCAN_LINE_PARSE.label: Scan Output Parse Error
E_SCAN_LINE_PARSE.description: Plugin scan output contained malformed JSON and could not be parsed.

E_LAUNCHER_COMPONENT_LOAD.label: Launcher Component Load Failed
E_LAUNCHER_COMPONENT_LOAD.description: Launcher provider QML component could not be loaded.

E_LAUNCHER_INSTANCE_CREATE.label: Launcher Instance Creation Failed
E_LAUNCHER_INSTANCE_CREATE.description: Launcher provider component loaded but instance creation failed.

E_LAUNCHER_QUERY.label: Launcher Query Failed
E_LAUNCHER_QUERY.description: Launcher provider threw an error while producing query results.

E_LAUNCHER_EXECUTE.label: Launcher Execute Failed
E_LAUNCHER_EXECUTE.description: Launcher provider failed while executing a selected item.

E_LAUNCHER_ACTION.label: Launcher Action Failed
E_LAUNCHER_ACTION.description: Launcher fallback action callback threw an error.

E_DAEMON_COMPONENT_LOAD.label: Daemon Component Load Failed
E_DAEMON_COMPONENT_LOAD.description: Daemon plugin QML component could not be loaded.

E_DAEMON_INSTANCE_CREATE.label: Daemon Instance Creation Failed
E_DAEMON_INSTANCE_CREATE.description: Daemon component loaded but instance creation failed.

E_DAEMON_START.label: Daemon Start Failed
E_DAEMON_START.description: Daemon instance was created but failed during start().

E_DOCKER_RUNTIME_UNAVAILABLE.label: Docker Runtime Unavailable
E_DOCKER_RUNTIME_UNAVAILABLE.description: Docker Manager could not reach the configured container runtime or inspect its containers.

E_DOCKER_SNAPSHOT_PARSE.label: Docker Snapshot Parse Failed
E_DOCKER_SNAPSHOT_PARSE.description: Docker Manager received runtime output that could not be parsed into a container snapshot.

E_DOCKER_ACTION_FAILED.label: Docker Action Failed
E_DOCKER_ACTION_FAILED.description: Docker Manager failed while executing a container or compose action.
